    • putTraveler

      public Municipality putTraveler(Character traveler, Municipality destination)
      Adds a traveler with a destination to the Travel. Can be used to add or set a traveler's location.
      Parameters:
      traveler - Character to add as a traveler on the Travel.
      destination - Destination of the traveler.
      Returns:
      Municipality previously set as the destination of the traveler, or null if no current destination.

    • removeTraveler

      public Municipality removeTraveler(Character traveler)

      public List<Vehicle> getAvailableVehicles()
